creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text: Samba 4.8.2 came out today (May 16). 4.8.1 was released on April 26. I do not know if either of these addresses the original issue, but 4.8.1 builds cleanly (at least with the very minimal set of options I have enabled) after removing two no-longer-relevant patch files, on both 10- and 11-STABLE and has been tested moderately on both. 4.8.2 needs devel/ldb13 updated to 1.3.3 before it will build. It has been lightly tested on 10-STABLE and also seems to work.
